title: Day 2 Lesson 1 ( Video )Ordering at the restaurant
html:
Day 2 - Lesson 1

なにを　ちゅうもん　するか　かんがえる = Thinking about what to order 

ばしょ (Location): レストラン = Restaurant

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): りゅうがくせい (study abroad student), やまださん だいがくせい (Yamada-san University student)

The new words you find in this lesson are:

りゅうがくせい (ryuugaksee) = study abroad student

からあげ (karaage) = fried chicken

りょうり (ryoori) = cuisine

とりにく (toriniku) = chicken meat

とり (tori) = chicken

にく (niku) = meat
